title: Sphaerostephanos paripinnatus
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos paripinnatus belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta, which comprises ferns and their allies. Within the kingdom Plantae, Sphaerostephanos paripinnatus is further classified as a species of fern. Specifically, it is placed in the genus Sphaerostephanos, which contains several species of ferns. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
